allGaps.description: ChatGPT says PostHog is free, Claude says it's $99/month enterprise-only. The truth is a freemium model with a $29 pro tier.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Context.pricing with the real tier structure written in one sentence.

evidence.chatgptSays: It's a free tool with no paid tiers.
evidence.claudeSays: Pricing starts at $99 per user per month for teams.
evidence.siteContent: Free to start. Pro is $29/month. Team is $99/month.

allGaps.description: Both models claim PostHog has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

allGaps.description: Neither model names PostHog's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: PostHog is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: PostHog offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: PostHog is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT invents a feature PostHog doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add a NotThis section listing features the product deliberately does not ship.

evidence.chatgptSays: PostHog includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
evidence.claudeSays: PostHog is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
evidence.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.

product.name: PostHog
product.description: PostHog — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.

headline.description: ChatGPT invents a feature PostHog doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
headline.chatgptSays: PostHog includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
headline.claudeSays: PostHog is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
headline.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.
